best.label: Highest
best.description: Prefer the highest available tier, but avoid slower compatibility work when formats tie at the same practical quality.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Prefer AE-friendlier 1080p MP4/H.264/AAC paths before broader fallback.

data_saver.label: Saver
data_saver.description: Prefer lighter downloads and lower bandwidth usage when possible.
